texto: We are prisoners of our thoughts. We like to imprison everyone in the same prison and think that it will solve the problems of humanity. Yet everyone is unique
autor: let them live freely and with harmony.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a let them live freely and with harmony.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “We are prisoners of our thoughts. We like to imprison everyone in the same prison and think that …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, debasish-mridha, everyone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
